creator: question+fbsdports@closedsrc.org
text:
On 2010-04-06 07:30 +0000, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of sysutils/memtest,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/145420 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/145420

PR approved. Thanks.

-- 
Linh Pham
